remarks: Tucked back from the road, 4 Westwood Drive feels like a home with its own private entrance ~ and the rent price is the actual price - WITH NO ADDITIONAL FEES. This Newer, Spacious apartment in sought after Westwood features an open designer kitchen with stainless steel appliances, granite countertops (being installed) sunny rooms lined with large windows, hardwood floors, central air, gas heat, excellent closet space and personal, in-unit washer & dryer. The popular & elegant Westwood community features impeccable on-site maintenance and grounds care. This fabulous apartment is pet-friendly, has off-street parking and 24-hour security. Pets are Ok, Dogs 35 Lbs. only, 2-Cats Ok or 1-dog and 1-cat OK ($300 fully refundable pet deposit required). Westwood is a No Smoking Community. Please have interested prospects submit the Westwood application uploaded in supplements with a credit check through Rentspree or Applyconnect only.  This apartment will be perfectly presented & made to sparkle before occupancy!
